cap_manage_menu_portfolio.name: Manage Menu Portfolio
cap_manage_menu_portfolio.description: Ability to curate and evolve the range of menu items offered across all channels, balancing variety with operational efficiency.

cap_manage_recipe_catalogue.name: Manage Recipe Catalogue
cap_manage_recipe_catalogue.description: Ability to maintain and version the library of recipes, including wood-fired preparation standards and ingredient ratios.

cap_manage_ingredient_specification.name: Manage Ingredient Specification
cap_manage_ingredient_specification.description: Ability to define and maintain quality, sourcing, and organic certification requirements for each ingredient.

cap_manage_meal_kit_portfolio.name: Manage Meal Kit Portfolio
cap_manage_meal_kit_portfolio.description: Ability to design, package, and evolve the weekly Pizza Night meal kit offering for the subscription channel.

cap_manage_sauce_product_line.name: Manage Sauce Product Line
cap_manage_sauce_product_line.description: Ability to develop and maintain the range of signature organic sauces sold through retail channels.

cap_manage_subscription_offering.name: Manage Subscription Offering
cap_manage_subscription_offering.description: Ability to structure and maintain the recurring subscription programme including pricing tiers and fulfilment cadence.

cap_manage_marketing_campaign.name: Manage Marketing Campaign
cap_manage_marketing_campaign.description: Ability to plan, execute, and measure hyper-local social media and community-based marketing initiatives.

cap_manage_community_partnership.name: Manage Community Partnership
cap_manage_community_partnership.description: Ability to establish and maintain partnerships with local community events and organisations for brand visibility.

cap_manage_digital_channel_presence.name: Manage Digital Channel Presence
cap_manage_digital_channel_presence.description: Ability to maintain and optimise the brand's presence across digital ordering platforms and social media.

cap_manage_loyalty_programme.name: Manage Loyalty Programme
cap_manage_loyalty_programme.description: Ability to operate the Dough-Points loyalty programme, including point accrual, redemption, and lifetime value maximisation.

cap_manage_customer_relationship.name: Manage Customer Relationship
cap_manage_customer_relationship.description: Ability to maintain a unified view of each customer across channels and personalise engagement accordingly.

cap_manage_customer_feedback.name: Manage Customer Feedback
cap_manage_customer_feedback.description: Ability to collect, analyse, and act on customer feedback and ratings to drive continuous improvement.

cap_manage_order_capture.name: Manage Order Capture
cap_manage_order_capture.description: Ability to receive and validate orders across all channels — dine-in, counter, branded app, and subscription.

cap_manage_order_pricing.name: Manage Order Pricing
cap_manage_order_pricing.description: Ability to apply the correct pricing rules, promotions, and Dough-Points discounts to each order.

cap_manage_payment_collection.name: Manage Payment Collection
cap_manage_payment_collection.description: Ability to process payments securely across multiple methods including in-app, counter, and subscription billing.

cap_manage_order_queue.name: Manage Order Queue
cap_manage_order_queue.description: Ability to prioritise and sequence orders in the production queue to meet promised delivery windows.

cap_manage_order_assembly.name: Manage Order Assembly
cap_manage_order_assembly.description: Ability to coordinate the assembly and packaging of completed orders for handoff to delivery or counter.

cap_manage_order_dispatch.name: Manage Order Dispatch
cap_manage_order_dispatch.description: Ability to hand off completed orders to the correct fulfilment channel — delivery driver, counter pickup, or subscription packaging.

cap_manage_supplier_relationship.name: Manage Supplier Relationship
cap_manage_supplier_relationship.description: Ability to onboard, evaluate, and maintain relationships with local and organic ingredient suppliers.

cap_manage_ingredient_sourcing.name: Manage Ingredient Sourcing
cap_manage_ingredient_sourcing.description: Ability to identify, negotiate, and secure supply of locally sourced organic ingredients at target cost.

cap_govern_sourcing_standards.name: Govern Sourcing Standards
cap_govern_sourcing_standards.description: Ability to define and enforce organic, local-sourcing, and sustainability standards across the supply base.

cap_manage_ingredient_stock.name: Manage Ingredient Stock
cap_manage_ingredient_stock.description: Ability to track real-time stock levels of perishable and non-perishable ingredients across storage locations.

cap_manage_inventory_replenishment.name: Manage Inventory Replenishment
cap_manage_inventory_replenishment.description: Ability to trigger and coordinate restocking based on demand forecasts, par levels, and supplier lead times.

cap_manage_perishable_waste.name: Manage Perishable Waste
cap_manage_perishable_waste.description: Ability to track, analyse, and minimise spoilage and waste of perishable ingredients.

cap_manage_production_scheduling.name: Manage Production Scheduling
cap_manage_production_scheduling.description: Ability to plan and sequence kitchen production runs to meet demand across dine-in, delivery, and subscription channels.

cap_manage_recipe_execution.name: Manage Recipe Execution
cap_manage_recipe_execution.description: Ability to ensure consistent, standards-compliant preparation of each menu item, including wood-fired cooking processes.

cap_manage_production_quality.name: Manage Production Quality
cap_manage_production_quality.description: Ability to monitor and assure the quality of food output against defined standards before handoff to fulfilment.

cap_manage_kitchen_equipment.name: Manage Kitchen Equipment
cap_manage_kitchen_equipment.description: Ability to track, maintain, and plan replacement of kitchen equipment including wood-fired ovens and prep stations.

cap_manage_facility_maintenance.name: Manage Facility Maintenance
cap_manage_facility_maintenance.description: Ability to maintain the ghost kitchen facility including utilities, cleanliness, and physical infrastructure.

cap_manage_kitchen_capacity.name: Manage Kitchen Capacity
cap_manage_kitchen_capacity.description: Ability to understand and optimise throughput capacity of the kitchen relative to order demand.

cap_manage_delivery_routing.name: Manage Delivery Routing
cap_manage_delivery_routing.description: Ability to calculate and assign optimal delivery routes to meet the 25-minute delivery promise.

cap_manage_driver_pool.name: Manage Driver Pool
cap_manage_driver_pool.description: Ability to recruit, schedule, and coordinate the pool of delivery drivers to match order volume.

cap_manage_delivery_platform.name: Manage Delivery Platform
cap_manage_delivery_platform.description: Ability to operate and evolve the Dough-Sync logistics app that powers delivery coordination.

cap_manage_delivery_timeliness.name: Manage Delivery Timeliness
cap_manage_delivery_timeliness.description: Ability to monitor and assure on-time delivery against the 25-minute-from-oven commitment.

cap_manage_delivery_quality.name: Manage Delivery Quality
cap_manage_delivery_quality.description: Ability to ensure the product arrives in the intended condition — temperature, packaging integrity, presentation.

cap_manage_delivery_performance_analytic.name: Manage Delivery Performance Analytics
cap_manage_delivery_performance_analytic.description: Ability to collect and analyse delivery KPIs to identify trends and drive continuous improvement.

cap_manage_revenue_tracking.name: Manage Revenue Tracking
cap_manage_revenue_tracking.description: Ability to record, reconcile, and report revenue across dine-in, delivery, and retail/subscription channels.

cap_manage_pricing_strategy.name: Manage Pricing Strategy
cap_manage_pricing_strategy.description: Ability to set and adjust pricing to maintain the premium-fast positioning while hitting margin targets.

cap_manage_channel_revenue.name: Manage Channel Revenue
cap_manage_channel_revenue.description: Ability to monitor and optimise revenue contribution from each channel — direct sales (40%), delivery (50%), retail (10%).

cap_manage_cost_control.name: Manage Cost Control
cap_manage_cost_control.description: Ability to monitor and contain variable and fixed costs, including organic COGS and lean operations overhead.

cap_manage_budget_planning.name: Manage Budget Planning
cap_manage_budget_planning.description: Ability to plan and allocate budget across operations, marketing, technology, and facility investment.

cap_manage_financial_reporting.name: Manage Financial Reporting
cap_manage_financial_reporting.description: Ability to produce financial statements and investor-facing reports including break-even tracking.

cap_govern_food_safety_standards.name: Govern Food Safety Standards
cap_govern_food_safety_standards.description: Ability to define, communicate, and enforce food safety standards across all preparation and handling processes.

cap_govern_hygiene_compliance.name: Govern Hygiene Compliance
cap_govern_hygiene_compliance.description: Ability to monitor and assure compliance with hygiene standards in the kitchen facility and during delivery.

cap_manage_quality_audit.name: Manage Quality Audit
cap_manage_quality_audit.description: Ability to plan and execute periodic quality audits and maintain the audit trail for regulatory purposes.

cap_govern_licensing_permits.name: Govern Licensing & Permits
cap_govern_licensing_permits.description: Ability to obtain, renew, and maintain all required food service, health, and business licences.

cap_govern_health_safety_compliance.name: Govern Health & Safety Compliance
cap_govern_health_safety_compliance.description: Ability to ensure ongoing compliance with workplace health and safety regulations in the kitchen and delivery operations.

cap_govern_employment_compliance.name: Govern Employment Compliance
cap_govern_employment_compliance.description: Ability to maintain compliance with employment law including driver classification, wages, and working conditions.

cap_govern_customer_data_privacy.name: Govern Customer Data Privacy
cap_govern_customer_data_privacy.description: Ability to protect customer personal and payment data collected through the ordering app and loyalty programme.

cap_govern_application_data_security.name: Govern Application Data Security
cap_govern_application_data_security.description: Ability to secure the Dough-Sync platform and branded app against data breaches and unauthorised access.

cap_manage_data_retention_policy.name: Manage Data Retention Policy
cap_manage_data_retention_policy.description: Ability to define and enforce data retention and deletion policies in line with privacy regulations.
